seo.title: Alixan - Products, UI Systems and Startups from Kazakhstan

hero.description: I'm Alikhan, a full-stack engineer and founder building digital products, open-source UI tools and startup experiments.
hero.panelTitle: Products, systems and experiments connected by one founder mindset.
hero.panelText: A single place for product building, interface systems and startup execution.

about.title: A short founder profile, not a resume page.
about.paragraph1: Alikhan is a full-stack developer from Almaty, Kazakhstan with a strong frontend background and a product mindset.
about.paragraph2: I build web, mobile and backend systems using Nuxt, Angular, Flutter, NestJS and MongoDB.
about.paragraph3: His focus is SaaS, marketplaces, UI systems, monetization and startup execution.

skills.title: Skills & expertise.
skills.description: The tools and systems I use to turn ideas into useful products.

design.description: Designing user interfaces from concept to production-ready products.
design.stack: Figma, Adobe Photoshop, Adobe Illustrator, Prototyping, Design Systems

frontend.title: Frontend
frontend.description: Complex interfaces, dashboards and product flows.
frontend.stack: Angular, Vue, Nuxt, React, TypeScript, RxJS

backend.title: Backend
backend.description: APIs, data, deployments and production ownership.
backend.stack: NestJS, Node.js, MongoDB, Redis, Docker, Nginx

mobile.title: Mobile
mobile.description: Cross-platform apps and realtime product scenarios.

experience.title: Experience & product launches.
experience.description: From enterprise systems to founder-led products built from Kazakhstan.

items.summary: Frontend ownership for a utility billing system used by calculation centers.
points: Turned complex billing logic into clear UI

items.summary: Joined two key banking products in a short period: installment payments and lending.
points: Synchronized dev/master branches with more than 700 diverging commits

items.summary: Led frontend work across e-commerce, admin tools and internal warehouse ERP.
points: Delivered a key product in 8 months
